## Features

- Redesigned the Explorer left panel with VS Code-style split sections for the file tree and recent files.
- Added a collapsible, vertically resizable Recent Files panel under the file tree, with the newest opened file shown first.
- Added workspace-scoped file history so MDE remembers the last opened file for each workspace and restores it after refresh or relaunch.
- Added active workspace persistence so a renderer reload reopens the previous workspace instead of showing the workspace picker again.
- Changed file and folder creation to use inline inputs at the selected directory location; if no directory is selected, new entries are created at the workspace root.
- Changed rename to use an inline input at the original tree row.

## Bug Fixes

- Right-click file tree context menus now close when clicking elsewhere, scrolling, or pressing Escape.
- Escape now cancels inline create and rename actions without creating or renaming entries.
- Recent file history is updated when entries are renamed and cleaned up when entries are deleted, avoiding stale paths after refresh.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit coverage for inline tree editing, context menu dismissal, recent file panel collapse/resize behavior, active workspace persistence, and workspace file history storage.
- Updated E2E coverage to use the new inline Explorer interactions and to verify context menu dismissal, recent files, and refresh restoration behavior.
- Added `workspaceFileHistory` storage helpers for workspace-scoped last-opened and recent-file tracking.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run build`
- Local E2E was not rerun by request; the E2E spec was updated and GitHub release automation will build the packaged macOS and Windows artifacts from this tag.

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.2.4-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.4-mac-arm64.zip`
- macOS Intel: `MDE-1.2.4-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.4-mac-x64.zip`
- Windows x64: `MDE-1.2.4-win-x64.exe`, `MDE-1.2.4-win-x64.exe.blockmap`, `latest.yml`
